name: vector-knowledge-graph
description: Vector Knowledge Graph tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: add_node
tools.description: Add a node to the knowledge graph with properties, embeddings, and metadata.

tools.name: add_edge
tools.description: Create a directed edge between two nodes with relationship type and weight.

tools.name: semantic_node_search
tools.description: Search for nodes using semantic similarity matching against stored embeddings.

tools.name: trace_compliance_chain
tools.description: Trace the compliance chain from a requirement through controls to evidence.

tools.name: find_gaps
tools.description: Find gaps in the knowledge graph where expected relationships or nodes are missing.
